data.name: Dominatrix Simulator: Threshold
data.detailed_description:
Good things come to those who obey.


This game is still in development.

Experience VR in an entirely new way as you respond in real life to the commands of the Goddess and her Mistresses in this kinky, immersive game.

Decide how you will respond to questions and commands and be judged for your performance. Your choices will alter your experience. Will you play naughty or nice? Why not try both?

Based on the on-and-offline lewd explorations of its creators, Dominatrix Simulator: Threshold offers players a unique gameplay experience that puts you at the mercy of your computer and introduces you to the DomSim universe.

Features in this game:

  • Implicit tutorial - Be immersed instantly and learn how to play the game, while also diving into the story
  • Multiple Mistresses - Choose from three Mistresses to interact with, experience a fourth in the tutorial, and get a sneak peek of four future Mistresses!
  • 'Perform' in real life to their commands - Pose recognition in VR, with feedback as players follow instructions
  • Infinite game play - With the task, punishment, and reward system, you can play as much as you want!
  • Choose your own experience - Interactive dialogue choices based on yes / no answers
  • Play with gender fluid options - Voice over dialogue and subtitles that reference the gender, pronoun and genitals selected

The game is built from the ground up to be experienced in VR. Recent feature improvements include basic support for Windows keyboard and mouse.

data.short_description: Be immersed in the world of the Goddess. There's no way out and molding you into the perfect submissive plaything is her greatest desire. Will you succumb to the trials of her Mistresses or resist letting go? Choose your own path. You will be judged.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言
data.reviews:
“A beacon of innovation and sexual exploration in VR porn games.”
Mashable

“It's ridiculously hot.”
The Daily Dot

“A sexually satisfying mix of BDSM and VR... Here, here, and bravo for giving us an emotional component to goddess worship”
Future of Sex

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1, Windows 8.1, or Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel® i5-4590 / AMD FX 8350
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce® GTX 970 / AMD Radeon™ R9 290 equivalent or greater
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: SteamVR. Standing or Room Scale
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 SP1, Windows 8.1, or Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel® i5-4590 / AMD FX 8350
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce® GTX 970 / AMD Radeon™ R9 290 equivalent or greater
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • VR Support: SteamVR. Standing or Room Scale
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
